question: Bill Nelson flew as a Payload Specialist on a Space Shuttle launched for the first time in what year? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Bill Nelson: He flew as a Payload Specialist on the Space Shuttle "Columbia".
1.subquestion: Which Space Shuttle did Bill Nelson fly on as a Payload Specialist?

2.fact: Space Shuttle Columbia: It launched for the first time on mission STS-1 on April 12, 1981, the first flight of the Space Shuttle program.
2.subquestion: In what year did Space Shuttle Columbia launch for the first time?
